title: Quran, Sura 40: Ghafir
description: Sura 40 (Ghafir: The Forgiver) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 40 (Ghafir: The Forgiver) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: The revelation of the Book is from God, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing — the forgiver of sin, accepter of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance.
